anatomic_site_tumor: To investigate the in vivo function of MEOX2 and SRGN in tumor propagation in an orthotopic xenograft model, we implanted MEOX2-knockdown CL GSCs or SRGN-knockdown MES GSCs into the brains of immunocompromised mice.
